personal.name: Luong Ngoc Chung
personal.label: Full Stack Developer
personal.summary: High-performing Full Stack Developer with a proven track record of architecting robust backend systems using PHP and Node.js. Versatile in engineering seamless UI/UX experiences across multiple environments, including Web (React), Mobile (React Native), and Desktop (Electron). Proficient in Python for both backend development and Machine Learning model training. Expert at bridging the gap between hardware and software through IoT and AI integration, delivering innovative, end-to-end technical solutions.

projects.title: SOF Smart Parking Management System
projects.description: This project is a comprehensive parking management ecosystem designed to streamline operations and fortify security through a sophisticated blend of software and hardware integration. Built on an API-first architecture, the system ensures seamless communication between the core processing engine and various user interfaces. The desktop application, developed with Electron, delivers high-performance stability across Windows, macOS, and Linux. Complementing this, the React Native mobile suite provides a versatile experience on iOS and Android, while also being deeply optimized for handheld mini POS devices to support on-the-spot thermal bill printing. The technical core of the system leverages AI-driven models for automated License Plate Recognition (LPR) and facial matching, integrated with RTSP camera streams for real-time surveillance and IoT modules for automated barrier control.
features: AI-driven License Plate Recognition (LPR) with real-time RTSP camera integration
Cross-platform desktop app via Electron (Windows, macOS, Linux)
React Native mobile suite optimized for handheld POS devices
IoT-controlled automated barrier gates
Real-time surveillance and facial matching
Thermal bill printing for on-the-spot transactions
ERP synchronization for enterprise data management
Multi-user role-based access control
achievements: Graduation thesis recognized with distinction by the examination committee
Successfully integrated and tested on specialized handheld POS hardware
Earned high praise from large-scale enterprises during live demonstrations
Proven deployment with stable real-world performance

projects.title: Multi-platform POS & Retail Management Solution
projects.description: A modern, all-in-one Point of Sale (POS) ecosystem tailored specifically for the F&B and retail sectors, offering unparalleled flexibility across diverse hardware environments. Engineered with a powerful ERP backend, the system enables real-time synchronization of inventory, sales data, and complex business workflows. The frontend, architected using React Electron and React Native, provides a unified and fluid user experience across desktop workstations, specialized dual-screen POS registers, tablets, and smartphones. Beyond standard transaction processing, the solution addresses the modern needs of digital commerce by integrating deep support for electronic invoicing (e-invoice) and leading digital payment gateways such as Momo, VNPay, and ZaloPay.
features: Universal cross-platform compatibility (Desktop, Tablet, Mobile, POS terminals)
Real-time inventory and sales synchronization via ERP backend
Dual-screen POS register support for enhanced checkout experience
Electronic invoicing (e-invoice) with full compliance
Integrated digital payment gateways (Momo, VNPay, ZaloPay)
Thermal receipt printing support
Advanced sales analytics and reporting dashboard
Multi-store management capability
achievements: Demonstrated flawless stability across all major operating systems and specialized retail hardware
Streamlined checkout process ensuring high-speed transactions during peak hours
Successfully implemented end-to-end e-invoice synchronization
Native support for the most popular cashless payment methods in Vietnam

projects.title: Modern Web & UI/UX Landing Page Collection
projects.description: A curated selection of high-performance, visually stunning landing pages designed to meet diverse industry needs. Each project is architected with a focus on SEO optimization, Core Web Vitals, and an immersive user experience. Leveraging the power of React and Next.js, these pages implement advanced frontend techniques including Tailwind CSS for rapid, responsive styling and SCSS/CSS3 for custom, intricate layouts. Framer Motion provides fluid, state-based animations and Three.js introduces interactive 3D elements, ensuring each site stands out in the digital landscape. Projects range from live production environments for established brands to high-fidelity showcases for sectors like Logistics, Education, and Industrial construction.
features: SEO-optimized architecture with semantic HTML and meta management
Core Web Vitals optimized for peak performance scores
Responsive design with mobile-first approach using Tailwind CSS
Fluid animations powered by Framer Motion
Interactive 3D elements using Three.js
Custom SCSS/CSS3 layouts for unique visual identities
Multi-industry coverage: Logistics, Education, Beauty, Gaming, and more
Production-ready deployment on Vercel
achievements: Successfully deployed multiple production websites for real businesses
Achieved high Lighthouse scores across all projects
Delivered pixel-perfect designs matching client specifications
Built reusable component libraries accelerating future development

projects.title: Tafas.vn | High-End E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Spearheaded by COVASOL, Tafas.vn is a sophisticated, high-performance e-commerce ecosystem built on Next.js. Operating in a dual-capacity role as both Lead Developer and Project Manager, I balanced hands-on technical execution with strategic leadership throughout the entire lifecycle. I personally engineered the complex business logic and high-precision system architecture required to manage thousands of intricate product variants and multi-level SKUs. A key highlight of this project is the highly complex back-office suite I architected to handle end-to-end operational management, ensuring seamless synchronization between technical backend complexity and a conversion-optimized UI/UX.
features: SEO-optimized architecture with Next.js and advanced SEO plugins
Advanced image optimization and lazy-loading for thousands of product variants
Granular Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for secure administration
Integrated payment and order management system
Complex product variant management with multi-level SKUs
Back-office suite for end-to-end operational management
Conversion-optimized UI/UX design
Real-time inventory synchronization
achievements: Near zero-bug production environment through rigorous QA
Exceptional client satisfaction resulting in long-term partnership
Successfully managing thousands of product variants in production
High-performance load speeds with advanced optimization

projects.title: SmartMath | AI-Powered Educational Platform
projects.description: Spearheaded by COVASOL, SmartMath is an innovative, AI-driven educational ecosystem designed to provide a modern and intelligent learning environment for both teachers and students. As the Project Lead and Lead Developer, I architected a comprehensive platform that features adaptive learning paths tailored to individual proficiency, a robust online examination engine, and real-time community interaction via Socket.io. The platform's core strength lies in its integrated AI Tutor, which provides instant mathematical solutions with professional-grade LaTeX rendering, alongside detailed learning analytics and a centralized administrative suite for resource management.
features: AI Mathematical Tutor with LaTeX-formatted responses
Adaptive learning paths based on student competency levels
Real-time chat system using Socket.io for peer collaboration
Full-cycle online testing module with automated grading
Time-limited exams with data-driven analytics
Centralized Admin Dashboard for resource management
Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for data security
Student progress tracking and learning analytics
achievements: Successfully integrated and fine-tuned AI Mathematical Tutor
Engineered intelligent content delivery system improving learning outcomes
Implemented high-performance real-time communication system
Developed comprehensive assessment engine with automated grading

projects.title: SOF E-commerce Platform | ERP-Integrated Solution
projects.description: A comprehensive, high-performance e-commerce and product showcase platform for SOF, utilizing a decoupled architecture with Next.js for the frontend and PHP-based APIs for the backend. A core technical challenge of this project was the seamless integration with the company's internal ERP system, enabling efficient data extraction and real-time synchronization of complex product catalogs and inventory. The entire system was engineered from the ground up, including a sophisticated product display engine, a secure online purchasing workflow, and integrated payment gateways.
features: Seamless ERP data synchronization with 100% accuracy
Decoupled architecture with Next.js frontend and PHP API backend
Advanced product filtering and search capabilities
Secure cart management and checkout process
Integrated payment gateways for streamlined transactions
Server-side rendering (SSR) and static generation (SSG)
Real-time inventory and pricing management
High-concurrency data handling between web platform and ERP
achievements: Achieved 100% accuracy in ERP data synchronization
Significantly improved search engine visibility with SSR/SSG
Maintained high standards of data integrity and security
Delivered scalable architecture for long-term maintainability

projects.title: COVASOL MiniERP/CRM | Enterprise Resource Planning
projects.description: A customized MiniERP/CRM ecosystem for COVASOL, built upon the Idurar open-source framework. This project involves comprehensive refactoring to align with specific enterprise needs, including a complete database migration to MySQL for enhanced scalability and data integrity. Currently leading the engineering of a brand-new frontend interface and the expansion of the backend architecture through the integration of custom modules for specialized business workflows.
features: Complete database migration from original to MySQL
Custom frontend engineering with modern UI/UX principles
Optimized database schemas and indexing for large-scale data
Rigorous version control and code refactoring strategies
Custom modules for specialized business workflows
Dashboard responsiveness and user productivity optimization
Scalable architecture for growing enterprise needs
Clean code principles throughout the codebase
achievements: Successfully migrated entire data layer to MySQL
Improved query performance for large-scale enterprise data
Maintained clean, high-quality codebase through rigorous refactoring
Replacing legacy interface with modern, intuitive frontend

projects.title: AI-Driven Facial Recognition & Anti-Spoofing Ecosystem
projects.description: A high-performance biometric recognition and attendance system designed for seamless enterprise integration. The core engine is built on a sophisticated Python stack, leveraging InsightFace for high-precision facial analysis and PyTorch for advanced anti-spoofing detection to prevent fraudulent entries via mobile screens or printed photos. Architected with a Flask-based API layer, the system provides real-time, high-FPS inference and has been successfully validated through rigorous field testing. A key technical milestone was the successful integration into a broader Smart Parking Management system, enabling simultaneous driver verification and automated attendance tracking synchronized directly with corporate ERP databases.
features: Advanced Anti-Spoofing Protection using PyTorch neural networks
High-Performance Real-time Recognition with ONNX Runtime and OpenVINO
Enterprise ERP Integration via Flask-SQLAlchemy for attendance sync
High-Speed Biometric Enrollment workflow
Scalable Microservice Architecture for easy ecosystem integration
Real-time RTSP camera stream processing
Automated attendance tracking synchronized with ERP
Live vs spoof detection (screens/photos)
achievements: Successfully distinguished live subjects from high-resolution spoofs
Achieved stable FPS and ultra-low latency for instant biometric verification
Seamlessly integrated as a standalone service into the SOF Parking suite
Validated through rigorous field testing by enterprise clients

projects.title: Enterprise Chatbot Management & Knowledge Orchestrator
projects.description: A centralized management platform for corporate chatbots, designed to streamline the deployment of sector-specific AI assistants. This platform empowers the company to generate and manage secure chat tokens for different business domains while ensuring that all responses strictly adhere to pre-configured knowledge bases and business rules. The system bridges the gap between raw data and conversational AI by connecting directly to the corporate ERP, fetching real-time data to provide accurate, context-aware answers. An automated documentation engine generates JSON schema and developer guides, significantly reducing integration time for frontend developers.
features: Dynamic Token & Sector Management for multi-tenant chatbot instances
ERP-Driven Intelligence with real-time corporate data feeding
Automated JSON documentation generation for rapid API integration
Strict rule-based response framework for professional boundaries
Multi-department chatbot configuration from a single dashboard
Secure data extraction from MySQL databases
Real-time context-aware response engine
Developer-friendly API documentation tooling
achievements: Developed multi-tenant management interface for independent chatbot instances
Integrated secure data extraction layer from corporate ERP
Auto-generated comprehensive JSON documentation for technical teams
Implemented strict rule-based framework ensuring verified company knowledge
